name: aiagentminder
description: Claude Code plugin: project governance for AI-assisted development — sprint execution, quality gates, worktree-isolated items, and structured planning. Install via /plugin marketplace add lwalden/AIAgentMinder.

scripts.test: node --test tests/validate.test.js tests/version-bump.test.js tests/decisions-log.test.js tests/backlog-capture.test.js tests/session-profiles.test.js tests/backlog-template.test.js tests/rule-reorganization.test.js tests/backlog-integration.test.js tests/session-infra.test.js tests/review-lenses.test.js tests/self-review-agents.test.js tests/sprint-update.test.js tests/sprint-stop-guard.test.js tests/sprint-phase-guard.test.js tests/context-monitor.test.js tests/context-cycle-hook.test.js tests/session-start-hook.test.js tests/session-start-cycle-reset.test.js tests/cycling-resume-chain.test.js tests/cycling-docs.test.js tests/stop-failure-hook.test.js tests/sprint-master.test.js tests/item-executor.test.js tests/quality-reviewer.test.js tests/phase-agents-plan-spec.test.js tests/phase-agents-pr-retro.test.js tests/orchestrator.test.js tests/sprint-metrics.test.js tests/exec-history-append.test.js
scripts.validate: node -e "import('./lib/validate.js').then(m => { const r = m.validateAll(process.cwd()); const errors = [...r.pluginJson.errors, ...r.versions.errors, ...r.layout.errors]; if (errors.length) { console.error('FAIL'); for (const e of errors) console.error(' -', e); process.exit(1); } console.log('OK'); console.log('versions:', r.versions.versions); console.log('layout:', r.layout.summary); })"

author: lwalden
